race_recovery.note: Concurrent DIR retry and WRK materialization wrote the shared files; this canonical receipt preserves the WRK PASS side and its immutable execution commit/report provenance.

plan.objective: Bind the terminal WRK object in the GD -> DIR -> WRK governance chain to the Claude runtime, with WRK-C1 as the primary executor contour and trace-based idempotent Telegram routing.
assumptions: GD runtime binding is evidenced by trace bem934_objects_bound_27750274693_gd_a1.
DIR runtime binding is evidenced by trace bem934_objects_bound_27750274693_dir_a2 and commit f201f24770b6987f8464de7498d7b16ec5cf2619.
WRK is the terminal object and has contours WRK-C1, WRK-C2, and WRK-C3; WRK-C1 is the primary executor contour.
Claude is the active provider for executor and auditor roles; the stale passport value codex_local is superseded by proof-bearing runtime evidence.
steps: Validate the full GD -> DIR -> WRK chain and the GD/DIR proof artifacts before WRK binding.
Assert Claude as the active runtime provider from routing/provider state, not from the stale passport field.
Verify WRK-C1, WRK-C2, and WRK-C3 managed channels are present and writable.
Run the auditor pre-check and confirm executor dispatch resolves to WRK-C1.EXECUTOR.
Create a WRK runtime-binding evidence record with trace_id, provider, workflow, passport path, source commit SHA, source receipt blob SHA, and source plan blob SHA.
Verify idempotent Telegram routing for the WRK trace: first delivery creates one WRK-C1 record and replay creates no duplicate.
Update objects_registry_v2.json only after the WRK evidence and the prior GD/DIR evidence validate.
Write a final BEM934-OBJECTS-BOUND receipt with all three trace IDs and immutable commit/blob identifiers.
acceptance: A WRK runtime binding snapshot exists and names trace bem934_objects_bound_repair_27751086692_wrk, provider claude, workflow .github/workflows/claude.yml, and passport governance/architecture/object_passports/WRK.json.
The WRK snapshot cites execution commit b907bccbb4b18dbd00751f9f1c18ae69ccbc1fa1 and report blob a56a37b2364988e5ba154d7cc3e4ab9153394e61.
GD, DIR, and WRK have three distinct real trace IDs and each object has a non-empty source commit/blob proof.
objects_registry_v2.json is BOUND only after all object checks pass.
The final receipt status is PASS and contains explicit checks for full path, Claude provider, and non-smoke execution.
risks: Shared materialization file collision can occur when multiple claude.yml runs finish concurrently; canonical per-object snapshots prevent evidence loss.
Passport runtime_provider fields may be stale; provider authority comes from runtime routing and proof artifacts.
The gpt_codex_cloud fallback is mechanical without OPENAI_API_KEY and OPENAI_MODEL and is not represented as an LLM-capable fallback.
